title: Sahyadri Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Sahyadri Hospitals is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Sahyadri Hospitals, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Consultant Physician for our Howrah operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Sahyadri Hospitals:
Sahyadri Hospitals is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Howrah, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sahyadri Hospitals!
